text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've noticed a change in<n><chrname> ever
since our<n>first concert.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Almost as if the heated passion of<n>that stage has
yet to cool in her...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I bring this up with Light Hello during<n>a meeting.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
Ah, s-sorry, didn't mean to shout. It's<n>just, I can
relate—I feel like I've been<n>way more productive
since our first<n>concert.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: ...Maybe this is the power of concerts.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It would seem that concerts have a<n>positive effect
on morale and growth,<n>whether you experience
them on<n>stage or off.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now then, time to think about our next<n>concert's
setlist. Somehow, work for<n><chrname>'s
sake doesn't<n>feel like work.
